strengths: Strong fullstack TypeScript/Node.js experience across multiple production platforms
Solid software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
React, REST, SQL, Docker, and Kubernetes exposure aligned with the stack
concerns: Seniority mismatch — staff/senior profile applying to a junior/mid role
High on-site presence required; candidate based in Berlin but no commitment signal
Limited explicit PostgreSQL and Nest.js experience (MongoDB-heavy background)
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tooling, far exceeding the technical bar for a junior/mid role. The main tension is seniority fit: a staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience may be misaligned with an entry-level individual-contributor position in terms of scope, growth trajectory, and compensation expectations. Domain experience in renewable energy or construction tech is not evident, though the engineering fundamentals transfer cleanly.
